CREATE TABLE test_real (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
SELECT * FROM test_real WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(value) AS average_value FROM test_real;
SELECT id FROM test_real WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_real);
SELECT id, value, ROUND(value, 2) AS rounded_value FROM test_real WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_real WHERE value < 0);
CREATE TABLE test_real2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
INSERT INTO test_real2 (id, value) VALUES (1, 1.2), (2, 2.3), (3, NULL);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value + t2.value AS total_value FROM test_real t1 JOIN test_real2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_real WHERE value BETWEEN -3.4028235E+38 AND 3.4028235E+38;
SELECT MAX(value), MIN(value) FROM test_real WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, EXP(value) FROM test_real WHERE value > 0;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_real) AS total_records, SUM(value) AS total_sum FROM test_real;
